nasb.text: Now behold, I will put ropes on you so that you cannot turn from one side to the other until you have completed the days of your siege.

esv.text: And behold, I will place cords upon you, so that you cannot turn from one side to the other, till you have completed the days of your siege.

cnv.text: 我要用繩子把你捆綁起來，使你不能轉身，直等到你圍困城的日子滿了。

ccb.text: 我要用绳索捆绑你，使你不能侧转，直到你围城的日子期满。
